items.name_en: New upgraded version In stock 🆕Chanel Pearl Chain Mini 22Bag
items.name_cn:
New upgraded version In stock 🆕Chanel Pearl Chain Mini 22Bag
♥Black C-081, Exclusive Italian leather
The star of the 23s show this year, Pearl mini 22bag, Black Gold, Jennie style, no reason not to buy!
Pearl, diamond quilting, black crack, sand gold,
These elements together are just too loveable!
This bag was already hot online before it even launched.
The brilliant design is god-tier! The capacity is great,
The elegant and stylish shape is beyond imagination 🖤
Hardware: 24K vintage gold buckle / Imitation pearl chain
Leather: Waxed patent calf leather
Size: 19*20*6 cm
A3980 Pearl Edition
8365092

items.name_cn:
25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
The mini shoulder bag fits my aesthetic perfectly. Made of lambskin with a quilted design. Features a small front pocket with no unnecessary details. Despite its small size, it fits a phone, lipstick, compact, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
size:22*18*10cm99473
